//: Standalone typecheck config for `npm test` / `npm run typecheck`. It does NOT extend tsconfig.json for two reasons: (1) the Next config's "../" exclude makes a bare `tsc` report TS18003 ("No inputs were found") because "../" resolves to the repo root, an ANCESTOR of web/, so every input is also excluded; (2) more importantly, the CI web job installs only web/node_modules, and TypeScript follows imports from web source into parent .ts files (e.g. worker/run-audit.ts -> ../../env, setups/http-agent.ts -> ../../lib/types). `exclude` cannot stop import-following, so those parent files enter the program regardless and fail with TS2307 (@solana/web3.js, bs58) when the parent tree's deps are absent. The `paths` entries below redirect those bare specifiers to web's OWN node_modules (web already declares @solana/web3.js / bs58 / @solana/spl-token as direct deps), so the imported parent sources resolve without a parent install. Parent .ts still gets typechecked (full coverage); it just resolves shared deps against web/. tsconfig.json (used by `next build`) is intentionally left unchanged.
